scripts.release: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" npm run tauri build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),g=fs.readdirSync('src-tauri/target/release/bundle/dmg').find(f=>f.endsWith('.dmg')&&!f.includes('_renamed'));if(g){const v=require('./package.json').version.replace(/\.0$/,''),n='src-tauri/target/release/bundle/dmg/Auchive_'+v+'.dmg';fs.renameSync('src-tauri/target/release/bundle/dmg/'+g,n);console.log('Built: '+n);}"
